tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All basic metabolic and glycemic parameters are within normal limits. Lipid profile shows elevated total cholesterol and LDL, and low HDL, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Renal function and urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio are normal. Recommend addressing dyslipidemia and monitoring cardiovascular risk factors.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
